Interface SidebarContributor

All Known Implementing Classes:
FishingContributor
public interface SidebarContributor
Interface for plugins that wish to contribute content to the player sidebar.

Contributors are registered once at plugin startup via SidebarService.registerContributor(SidebarContributor). On each refresh, getLinesFor(Player) is called to retrieve the current lines for a given player. Returning an empty list hides the section entirely — no blank space is left.

Contributors are sorted by getPriority() — lower values appear higher in the sidebar. If multiple contributors return content, a blank separator line is inserted between sections automatically.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getId()
    Returns the unique identifier for this contributor.
    List<SidebarLine>
    getLinesFor(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
    Returns the sidebar lines to display for the given player.
    int
    getPriority()
    Returns the priority that controls this contributor's vertical position relative to others.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      String getId()
      Returns the unique identifier for this contributor. Used for registration and removal.
      Returns:
      the contributor ID, e.g. "sylphian-fishing-bait"

    • getPriority

      int getPriority()
      Returns the priority that controls this contributor's vertical position relative to others. Lower values appear higher.
      Returns:
      the priority value

    • getLinesFor

      List<SidebarLine> getLinesFor(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Returns the sidebar lines to display for the given player. This is called on every refresh — keep it fast. Return an empty list to hide this contributor's section entirely.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to get lines for
      Returns:
      ordered list of lines, top to bottom, or empty to hide
